text_original: Worst app no previous story context and lots of hallucinations. I lost interest
text_zh: 最差的App，没有之前的剧情上下文，而且有大量的幻觉。我失去兴趣了。
reply_original: I'm truly sorry for the frustrating experience with memory and hallucinations. We recently upgraded our Memory Service to improve long-term retention. You can also use the "Pin" feature to save key context. Please email your UID and screenshots to support@fantachat.ai so our team can investigate and fix this for you.
reply_zh: 对于记忆和幻觉问题给您带来的糟糕体验，我深表歉意。我们最近升级了记忆服务，以提升长期记忆保留能力。您也可以使用“固定”功能来保存关键上下文。请将您的 UID 和截图发送邮件至 support@fantachat.ai，以便我们的团队进行调查并为您解决此问题。
